'''Sarell Harmion''' was an executive who worked for [[Gastess' Finance, Inc.]] Like his employer [[Sarlim Gastess]] and his brothers [[Halleb Harmion|Halleb]] and [[K'yne Harmion|K'yne]], he operated by taking control of well-run corporations, ruthlessly running them for short-term profit, and leaving the ruins behind once every last [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]] was gone. Though he was the only one of the Harmion brothers who was unmarried, it is reported that he had an obnoxious girlfriend who took a sadistic glee in his work.
